---
title: "05. 比例、相似与跨尺度迁移"
subtitle: "Proportion, Similarity, and Cross-Scale Transfer"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 5
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How Books V-VI make ratio and similarity the core mechanism for cross-scale geometric transport."
---

**Books:** Book V, VI  
**Omega Directions:** `modular tower inverse limit`, `rate-distortion information theory`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_05_proportion_similarity_and_cross_scale_transfer.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
